feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Best Approach for Changing Connection from Quality to Production in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,  
 
I would like your advice on the following issue. We have a customer with only one SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) tenant, the production one, without a test environment.  
 
We started implementing some dashboards using S/4 data, based on the Quality system connection. As a result, we built the data models and corresponding stories using the Quality connection.  
 
Now that we are in the UAT phase, we are wondering what the best approach would be to change the connection from Quality to Production without having to create the models and stories from scratch. Ultimately, we aim to have two versions of the stories, one with Quality data and another with Production data.  
 
Any guidance or best practices would be greatly appreciated!  
 
Thank you in advance.
SAP Analytics Cloud, connectivity

entry.title: Count total amount of a dimension
entry.content:
Hello! I'm trying to create a graph in our team story, where I need to calculate the average of the score performance of each member of the team, and for that, I need to count the amount of times the owner repeats in the data, but the counting dimensions option doesn't work for me and I'm trying to find a way to do this. 

Also I will appreciate if someone can help me in a way if it's possible to have a format condition like in Excel where with a condition, I can assign a color to the bars of a graph.

entry.title: Top N with multiple measure in single widget sac
entry.content:
I have 6 measure and 1 dimension[staff] in this i want to get top 1 of each measure in single widget. Please explain me how can we done in sac 

Regards,
Thayu.

entry.title: Builder is currently unable to access the data source error
entry.content: I am getting this error for all the tables and charts within one of my stories. Other stories using the same datasource do not have the same issue. I have tried deleting the story and copying it back from our other tenant (where the same story doesn't have this issue), but that didn't help. However, if I recreate the page and then import that page into the broken story, it works just fine. This is the second time this has happened (different stories and different data sources), and I'm wondering if this is a known issue or if there is an easier way to resolve this rather than rebuilding the story from scratch. See screenshot:

entry.title: is there a way to maintain or upload custom css files in sap analytics cloud?
entry.content:
Hi

I am trying to apply border top radius property to button. SAP delivered CSS file not supporting that property. Is there any way to upload custom css file in SAC server so that we can call in story

 

 

Regards

Mahesh

entry.title: User Content
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We want to use SAP IPS for user provisioning to Cloud Apps (SAC, Enable Now...)

What happens to the content of users when these users are automatically deleted (e.g., in SAC) via IPS in these apps?

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards

entry.title: SAC optimized story - Issue with hirarchy objects
entry.content:
Hi all,

We encountered the following problem when working with SAC story in optimized mode. 

1. Created open ods view (facts) based on a database table (BW4HANA)

2. Created infoobject with hierarchy

3. Associated a field in open ods view with the hierarchy infoobject.

4. Created query on top of the open ods view.

5. Created live model in SAC based on the query we created earlier.

Now when we want to create a chart or table in SAC story optimized we are unable to add the hierarchy dimension. Everything freezes, we cant add any other dimension, we cant save the story, we cant change the data source, we cant delete the objects in story, we cant do anything.

But when we work in SAC story classic mode everything works fine. Looks like a bug to me. Any ideas?

Best regards, 

Martin Zluky

entry.title: Sap Analytics Cloud (SAC) - Show filter variable defined on Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have defined an Analytical Model in SAP Datasphere with the following input variable populated through a prompt

I imported the AM model in SAP Analytics Cloud and as soon as I open the report the system ask me to insert a value for the specific variable

So far so good. What I would like to now is to display this simple value on each row of my table. How can reach this goal? 

Thank you in advance for your time,

Regards

Rocco

entry.title: Replace (No Value) with an empty string
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am new on SAP Analytics Cloud and I would like to learn how to replace (No Value) in my table. My data contains empty string for EBELN but when it is empty and I add the EBELN in my table, it shows (No Value) as you can see from the picture:

I found a work around by replacing empty string with a space using the following formula:
IF(EBELN='', ' ', EBELN). 

It is working in my table but I don't want to replace data even with a space. Is there a way to do that in a more flexible way?

Thank in advance,
Rocco

entry.title: Structure in BW Query designer, How to do best in SAC
entry.content:
I am looking for the best way to have a predefined row structure (selections and formulas) in SAC, like it was possible in BW Query designer. 

example : 

Gross Sales            
 thereof GS - Retail
 % share Retail on Totals GS
thereof GS - Wholesale
 % share Wholesale Totals GS
thereof GS - Ecom
...

To filter the combination of each line, different Dimensions have to be filtered and combined (like in advanced filtering)


This row structure should be reusable across different stories. 

thank you 

Dieter 

#SAC

entry.title: Is linked analysis possible in Optimized mode SAC Live model ?
entry.content: I am getting the option greyed out when trying to do a linked analysis. We have a S4HANA live data model. Any pointers will be helpful

entry.title: SAC Ranking by Row
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Our teams face a customer issue about we need to use ranking function in SAC.

But in this ranking, it ranking form must by row (refer to pic.)

We have tried to use client calculation -> Rank Number, but it seems ranking display by column

Please let me know if there's a way to do this in SAC story, thanks!

Mark

entry.title: Dynamic Text in manually added columns
entry.content:
Hi all, 

Can anyone assist me? I'm facing an issue while creating a financial statement with a five-year strategic plan. The data is coming into SAC from a BW Live Query, and all the modeling is done in BW. I have five columns with data coming from BW, namely Business Plan 2025, Business Plan 2026, Business Plan 2027, Business Plan 2028, and Business Plan 2029. These columns were used to derive five additional columns manually in SAC by adding new columns and hiding the original ones. However, the new columns have an issue—once the text is added, it does not update when the fiscal year changes. How can I make the text dynamic so that the headings adjust automatically based on the selected fiscal year? If the fiscal year changes from 2025 to 2026, the Business Plan headings should update accordingly, starting from 2026 to 2030.I attempted to create an input control and link it to dynamic text, but it isn't working. please assist if we can do it by scripting

entry.title: SAC Input control Issue
entry.content:
I have a client for whom i'm buillding a report in SAP SAC. The connection is established through S/4HANA using a live connection. All the information is being exposed to SAC through the usage of a CDS.

Here's the issue. When using input control to create a filter or any page filter in general and then selecting filter by member, no data is displayed. On the other hand when using conditional filtering (greater than or any other condition) the values are displayed as normal. So for some reason they are not recognized as member values.

entry.title: HANA Cloud x Analytics cloud: Average and Median (wrong)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Using HANA Cloud with a live connection to Analytics cloud, the aim is to retrieve the values calculated in HANA (calculation view). Sadly, the values displayed in SAC are not the same as in SQL.

SAC:

HANA (SQL)

Average

One column of the calculation view has a "AVG" aggregation type. Its value in SAC is not the same even if the aggregation type is set to "AVG".

Median

Since the live model in SAC does not propose MEDIAN, I try "NONE" as agregation type but it returns 0.

Conclusion

I have a feeling that there is no way to retrieve the results calculated in HANA (similar to "delegated" aggregation type). The only foreseen option is to calculate (again) the fields in the model, which is an issue regarding the data governance (since the formula would be defined at two different places).

Did you face similar issues with these calculations in this context ? How did you solve these ?
SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database SAP Analytics Cloud SAP HANA Live SAP HANA Cloud

entry.title: Total SUM not correct when expanded
entry.content:
Hello, 

i have a SAC report with a table widget in which i have in ROWS a date as hierarchy (Year-Month..) and on Columns i have a text field which could have 3 different values lets say (A, B and C).

So i see the different years 2022,2023,2024 and the corresponding values for each indication (A, B and C). 
Then i have set to display the totals, ok so fine so far if all is collapsed i see the totals below also flagged (Arrange Totals / Parent nodes below). 

But as soon as i expand a year like 2022 to see the monthly values the total sum is not correct anymore somehow it skippes all which is below this year and i get only the total sum of this expanded year as the last total column but why does SAC not take all the values and make a SUM like before when it is collapsed. 

I think the problem is due to the dimension because this dim can have different values for different things. A = 100, B = 0, C = 0, 
Other case A = 0, B = 100, C = 0

If i take a dimension which is fixed like country it sums up correctly also when i expand to the months of some year. 


Thanks for any help!

entry.title: How to pass param's to openURL
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

For now SAC not supporting to send param's to openURL in Advanced script. Is there a way to send param's to custom widget to  filter  out data in external system's that can be called from SAC dash board

 

Regards

Mahesh

entry.title: Dynamic Date Range Selector in SAC Story based on Datasphere Live Model
entry.content:
Hi experts and fellow learner,

I want to create a dynamic Actual/Plan report (not planning enabled). The desired output looks like forecast layout (but doesn't have to be a forecast layout as long as the period ranges of each version can be dynamically displayed) as below.

For example:

Within a year, Jan - July is displayed in Actual Version, Aug - Dec is in Plan Version.

 

As a side note, I'll consume the data from Datasphere Live Model (Analytic model - Live) instead of Import/Standalone Model.

Here's my concern which leads to the question whether this is achievable or not:

When I try to consume the data of DSP analytic (Live) model in SAC story, I don't see any option to filter member by range in the builder pane (as opposed to import model). As far as I understand, this is required in order to select the "current date" - which acts as "Actual Cut-Over Date" and can be selected on the fly. Which leads to question, is there any limitation data consumption in story of DSP Live Data Model in regards to this?


Is there any workable solution to achieve the desired output? Any input would be appreciated. Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Restricted measure not having option for Date Range
entry.content:
Hi,

I've just reloaded a planning model which has 3 Dates. 2 are Fiscal, one is not. And now on the two Fiscal Dates whenever I create a Restricted Measure or Account if I select either of the Fiscal Dates I only get the option of either Select by Member or Input Control. No Date Range selection is available. 

This is a critical problem. Anybody who has experienced this or knows how to fix it. Would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Charles

entry.title: How can I do a calculation in SAC story to sum values over fiscal periods?
entry.content:
I have a model which brings data for past periods until current period. I have another model that brings data for current period. I am displaying amount for current period in a table and next to it I want the YTD (sum of amounts from all previous periods fetched in the YTD model. I am using classic mode and blended the two models. The issue is my YTD sum looks very large. What best calculation can I use on story to get proper values. see attached details . 

 fiscal period 8,9 are referring to Feb, March 2025

Any pointers would be very helpful
